-- This script was generated by the ERD tool in pgAdmin 4.
-- Please log an issue at https://github.com/pgadmin-org/pgadmin4/issues/new/choose if you find any bugs, including reproduction steps.
BEGIN;


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.clients
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    name character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    address text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT clients_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.jobs
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    client_id integer NOT NULL,
    title character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    description text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    status character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT jobs_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.supply_entries
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    job_id integer NOT NULL,
    supplier character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    reference character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    total_amount numeric(10, 2) NOT NULL,
    date date NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT supply_entries_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.work_entries
(
    id serial NOT NULL,
    job_id integer NOT NULL,
    date date NOT NULL,
    num_workers integer NOT NULL,
    hours_per_worker numeric(10, 2) NOT NULL,
    title character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    description text COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    location character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT work_entries_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.jobs
    ADD CONSTRAINT jobs_client_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (client_id)
    REFERENCES public.clients (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.supply_entries
    ADD CONSTRAINT supply_entries_job_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (job_id)
    REFERENCES public.jobs (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;


ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.work_entries
    ADD CONSTRAINT work_entries_job_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (job_id)
    REFERENCES public.jobs (id) MATCH SIMPLE
    ON UPDATE NO ACTION
    ON DELETE NO ACTION;

END;
